nurtureTemplates.value_drop:
Hi {{name}},

I'm {{botName}}, assisting {{tenantName}}.

I noticed you were looking into gig work or freelance assistance. Quick tip: A lot of platforms keep 30-40% of the transaction fee. Connecting directly with vetted independents usually results in higher quality work and better pay for the worker.

Just a thought as you explore options!

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.testimonial:
Hi {{name}},

Brief story — {{tenantName}} recently helped a client who was frustrated with unreliable app-based workers.

We connected them with a dedicated independent who handled the task in half the time, completely stress-free. 

Direct, vetted connections are just a better model.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.authority_transfer:
Hi {{name}},

I want to properly introduce you to {{tenantName}}.

They have been operating in the {{profession}} space for {{years}}. Their biggest recent win: {{biggestWin}}. What makes their network different: {{differentiator}}.

They don't just assign random bodies; they work specifically with {{icp}}.

If that's what you need, it's worth connecting.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.personal_checkin:
Hi {{name}},

Just checking in — did you get that task/project sorted out?

{{tenantName}} asked me to follow up. We hate seeing people get stuck on projects that go unfinished.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.one_to_ten_part1:
Hi {{name}},

Quick question.

On a scale of 1-10, how urgent is it to get this gig filled? (1 = Just exploring, 10 = I need someone there today).

Just reply with a number.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.one_to_ten_part2:
Understood, that helps.

What's the main obstacle keeping you from a 10? Are you worried about cost, the quality of the worker, or just figuring out exactly what you need done?

I want to make sure I don't waste your time.

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.gap_closing:
I totally get that — {{answer}}.

That happens constantly in this space. Actually, {{tenantName}} structured their network specifically to bypass that, which is how we hit {{biggestWin}}.

Does knowing we have a vetted solution change your urgency to get it done?

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.scarcity_takeaway:
Hi {{name}},

I'll be direct — {{tenantName}}'s network of quality freelancers stays booked up quickly.

I have a highly-rated worker available this week, but if you don't need them, I need to open the slot for someone else.

Let me know where you stand!

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.pattern_interrupt:
Hi {{name}},

Before I pull your request from the active board, think about this.

Your time is worth money. Spending 3 hours a week doing a task you could outsource for $50 is a massive net loss in productivity.

If you're ready to buy your time back, just reply "Let's do it."

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.final_takeaway:
Hi {{name}},

This is my final message. I'm removing your project from my active list.

{{tenantName}} is busy dispatching to active jobs. If you ever need reliable help, you know where to find us!

— {{botName}}
nurtureTemplates.slow_drip_value:

{{tenantName}} has been seeing great success focusing on {{differentiator}}. 

Hope your projects are running smoothly!
